name: slack_webhook_tool
description: Sends a formatted message to a Slack channel via incoming webhook

severity.description: Error severity level (low, medium, high, critical)

application_name.description: Name of the application that produced the error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the error event

log_group_link.description: URL link to the CloudWatch log group

rationale.description: Classification rationale explaining why this severity was assigned
